product: Real-time clinical dictation and documentation system for healthcare providers
primary_challenge: DLI credentials not recognized for NeMo course enrollment. Riva ASR WER 18% higher than target on clinical dictation background noise.
deployment_target: cloud - AWS with on-premise option for enterprise
twelve_month_goal: 10,000 clinical hours transcribed per month with 95% accuracy on medical terminology
investor_narrative: Each hour of clinical documentation automated saves 2 physician hours — direct ROI for hospital procurement
